basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has officially announced the Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Eligible candidates holding a PhD in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Ceramic Engineering, or related disciplines with relevant research experience and publications can submit their applications through Email on or before 20 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD from Metallurgical and Materials Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/Ceramic Engineering
qualification.details: PhD from Metallurgical and Materials Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/Ceramic Engineering with good quality publications. Good Knowledge on Corrosion and Wear behavior of Metallic Materials. Good Knowledge on Biomaterials and Bioimplants applications. Proficiency in various materials characterization techniques for structural and biomaterials. Candidates who have recently submitted their doctoral thesis are also eligible subject to furnishing proof of PhD award at the interview.

salary_details.details: Rs. 80,000/- per month (+ HRA as per rules) with contingency of Rs. 50,000/- per annum

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Roorkee Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: PhD from Metallurgical and Materials Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/Ceramic Engineering with good quality publications. Good Knowledge on Corrosion and Wear behavior of Metallic Materials. Good Knowledge on Biomaterials and Bioimplants applications. Proficiency in various materials characterization techniques for structural and biomaterials. Candidates who have recently submitted their doctoral thesis are also eligible subject to furnishing proof of PhD award at the interview.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 80,000/- per month (+ HRA as per rules) with contingency of Rs. 50,000/- per annum

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 20th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Post Doctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, or Ceramic Engineering, along with good quality publications and relevant knowledge in specified areas.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 80,000/- per month, plus HRA as per rules, and a contingency of Rs. 50,000/- per annum.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Post Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview, which may be conducted in either offline or online mode.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates who have submitted their thesis but not yet awarded their PhD apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who have recently submitted their doctoral thesis are eligible, provided they can furnish proof of their PhD award at the time of the interview.

faq.question: Q9. What are the key areas of knowledge required for this position?
faq.answer: Candidates should have good knowledge of the corrosion and wear behavior of metallic materials, biomaterials and bioimplants applications, and various materials characterization techniques.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
